entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelBooster.name: Channel Booster
entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelBooster.description: A booster that can only be entered depending on its given channel

state0: How the booster should behave when inactive/even
state1: How the booster should behave when active/odd
placements.triggerTemplates: Whether entering this bubble will trigger parent templates
placements.give_liftspeed: Whether to give a riding player liftspeed when in moving templates
placements.self_activating: Should the given channel toggle when the player exits the booster
placements.quantumJank: it needs to be preserved for backwards compat.

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelClearCo.description: Entity that manages channel resetting when constructed in a room

placements.channel: Sets this singular channel to the specified value
placements.value: Set the channel to this value
placements.clear_all: Completely reset all channel values to 0
placements.clear_prefix: Set all channel values with this prefix to 0

entities.auspicioushelper/CollisionCount.description: Count the number of collisions between entities in two groups

placements.groupA: List of entity ID paths in group A
placements.groupB: List of entity ID paths in group B
placements.onlyCollidableA: Only collidable entities in A will have their collisions count
placements.onlyCollidableB: Only collidable entities in B will have their collisions count
placements.channel: The channel to set when collisions have been counted

entities.auspicioushelper/FinderCollider.description: Change an entity's collider when a channel is set. Will not be stable for entities such as the player that frequently change their collider on their own. Does not need to be in same room as targeted entity.

placements.channel: Channel to listen to. If left blank, will change the channel on spawn only.
placements.collider: New collider to set. Format is collidertype:[parameters] such as rect:[-8,-8,16,16] for a 16-wide centered rectangle

entities.auspicioushelper/channelTemplat.description: Move the nearest unrooted template. An unrooted template either has no parent or is disconnected from its parent's movement.

placements.activateChannel: Will start the sequence when this channel is set. Multiple sequences can run at the same time.
placements.shakeTime: How long to shake before movement starts
placements.arrivalShake: How long to shake when arriving at the destination
placements.moveTime: The time it takes to move
placements.easing: The easing to use when moving
placements.relative: If checked, the entity will move as if this entity was placed directly on top of it (with the node similarly shifted)

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelHotCold.description: Set a channel based on the core mode

placements.Hot_value: the value to set in hot mode
placements.Cold_value: the value to set in chilly mode

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelJelly.description: A jellyfish that changes state based on channel

placements.state0: The state to use when the channel is even
placements.state1: The state to use when the channel is odd

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelMathCon.description: Run compiled expressions on channels, flags and entity states. Reccomended to read the wiki, read the compiler, get a PHD, and hit the modder

placements.compiled_operations: Encoded compiled operations, gotten from the compiler website
placements.run_immediately: Run immediately when a watched channel changes. This can very easily cause infinite loops and is not reccomended unless you know what you are doing.
placements.custom_polling_rate: If defined, will run the code every X frames. If not defined, will run whenever a channel that is being used in an expression updates.
placements.multi_type: Behavior to use when starting a script when the script is already running
placements.activation_cond: When to try to start scripts
placements.debug: Whether to print debug information to the current debugging view
placements.notifying_override: List of channels that override the usual watched channels as a starting condition
placements.only_run_for_nonzero: Won't run when notifying channels change to set to zero

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelPlayerW.description: Watch the player and set a channel when various conditions are met

placements.valueWhenMissing: Value to set when player is dead
placements.custom: Perform reflection, getting all fields in this list successively and trying to cast to double. Kinda cursed

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelReflect.description: Very cursed. Only use if you understand what 'reflector' means here.

placements.logAccessible: Log all available values of the class that can be used at the tail of the access list as the next step
placements.valueIfNull: If a null is ever encountered, will set the channel to this value.
placements.access: List of fields to successively access. Attempts to cast the last to a double to set the channel

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelSprite.description: Sprite that can display animations defined in Sprites.xml based on a channel. Check auspicioushelper's Sprites.xml for an example setup.

placements.attached: Whether to attach the entity to solids
placements.edge_type: How to pick the case when the channel is less than zero or greater than cases-1
placements.cases: number of cases defined in XML
placements.depth: it's what you would expect from this field

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelSwitch.description: Core switch that actually toggles channels

placements.on_only: Only triggerable in the on state
placements.off_only: Only triggerable in the off state
placements.cooldown: Cooldown for hitting this particular switch (the channel itself is not constrained)
placements.switchsprite: Define the sprite so that it matches vanilla format.

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelTheo.description: I got peer pressured into making this on my third day of modding (it was fun though). Jank.

placements.channel: When nonzero, used the cursed behavior
placements.switch_thrown_momentum: Player and holdable switch momentum when throwing
placements.swap_thrown_positions: Switch positions with holdable dangerously when throwing(may clip player)
placements.swap_thrown_positions_nodie: Don't clip player into wall when switching positions
placements.player_momentum_weight: When grabbed, how much the final player velocity should use the player's velocity
placements.theo_momentum_weight: When grabbed, how much the final player velocity should use Theo's velocity

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelTrigger.description: Trigger the (smallest area) trigger at a certain area

placements.channel: Channel to watch. If the entity has nodes, setting the channel to n triggers the smallest trigger at the n'th node, with 0 corresponding to the main entity. If no nodes are present, any non-0 channel value will trigger the overlapping trigger

entities.auspicioushelper/SpriteAnimChai.description: This is an entity for emptynoise(tollab) and is not supported in other contexts

entities.auspicioushelper/ConditionalStr.description: Conditional strawberry that does not increase map strawberry count. Winged strawberry flies to the node when specified. Must be collected in conditional strawb collect trigger

placements.strawberry_id: Name of the strawberry to use in collect triggers
placements.appear_channel: Channel to check whether strawberry should appear
placements.appear_roomenter_only: Only check the appearance channel when entering the room (i'm not sure unchecking this works; never tested)
placements.fly_channel: Channel to watch for flying away
placements.nodeSelectorCh: Channel selecting which node the strawberry flies to when scared. If not listed, will be 1 if a node exists.
placements.deathless: Act like a golden, returning to this strawberry's initial room when you die with it
placements.flyOnDashNormal: Fly away like normal strawberry on dash
placements.flyOnDashFollower: Fly away if you dash while holding the strawberry
placements.persist_on_death: The strawberry will stick around even if you die
placements.sprites: The sprites to use for this. Currently not working, will fix later.

entities.auspicioushelper/ConditionalStr.description: Conditional strawberry that adds to the map's strawberry count. Winged strawberry flies to the node when specified. Must be collected in conditional strawb collect trigger

placements.strawberry_id: Name of the strawberry to use in collect triggers
placements.appear_channel: Channel to check whether strawberry should appear
placements.appear_roomenter_only: Only check the appearance channel when entering the room (i'm not sure unchecking this works; never tested)
placements.fly_channel: Channel to watch for flying away
placements.nodeSelectorCh: Channel selecting which node the strawberry flies to when scared. If not listed, will be 1 if a node exists.
placements.deathless: Act like a golden, returning to this strawberry's initial room when you die with it
placements.flyOnDashNormal: Fly away like normal strawberry on dash
placements.flyOnDashFollower: Fly away if you dash while holding the strawberry
placements.persist_on_death: The strawberry will stick around even if you die
placements.sprites: The sprites to use for this.

entities.auspicioushelper/ChannelToFlag.description: This is a paranoia entity for people who don't trust the @ prefix to always work due to weird inlining or weird design choices by other mods
